title: Don't Expose Pre-Filter Counts
summary: Hide raw scrape counts from the UI while filtering is in progress; they create false signals about result size.
body: The SourcesPanel was showing `source_progress.scanned` (raw scrape totals) while the pipeline was still filtering jobs, creating a false signal: '1500 jobs found' when the actual result set was far smaller. Hide these raw counts on `scanning` and `queued` rows. Preserve activity signal via progress bars and latest-scanned-title. The fix prevents users from misinterpreting intermediate scrape state as final result size. Implemented in PR #220 alongside the max_tokens fix.
